# ADR Template

## Purpose

Use this template for Architecture Decision Records. An ADR records one accepted, proposed, rejected, or superseded architecture decision at the level where the decision applies.

## Template Body

```md
# ADR-NNNN: <Decision Title>

## Status

Proposed | Accepted | Superseded | Rejected

## Date

YYYY-MM-DD

## Scope

Container | Direction: <name> | Service: <name>

## Context

Describe the situation, constraints, and forces that required a decision.

## Decision Drivers

- <Driver 1>
- <Driver 2>

## Decision

Describe the selected decision clearly.

## Considered Alternatives

### Option 1: <Name>

Summary, benefits, and drawbacks.

### Option 2: <Name>

Summary, benefits, and drawbacks.

## Consequences

### Positive

- <Expected benefit>

### Negative / Tradeoffs

- <Cost, limitation, or risk>

## Follow-Up Actions

- <Action and owner, if known>

## Related Documents

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)

## Supersedes / Superseded By

- Supersedes: <ADR link or "None">
- Superseded by: <ADR link or "None">
```
